'''Nardo''' was the chief of [[Thalassa Tarkin|Lady Tarkin's]] security forces at [[Port Tarkin]] on [[Phelarion/Legends|Phelarion]].

==Biography==
When Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] was stranded on the planet and forced to work as Lady Tarkin's housemaid, Nardo did not trust her. After watching her for a few days, he discovered her using the [[Subspace transceiver/Legends|subspace transponder]] to get a message to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Nardo fired on her, but missed, striking a nearby [[Megonite moss/Legends|megonite moss]] display case, which exploded, killing him. Ironically, it had been Nardo who had insisted on keeping the display inside.
